programme.title: 请问今晚住谁家

programme.title: 两岸大视野

programme.title: 全民星攻略
programme.desc: 益智实境节目，由馆长曾国城担任知识把关者，考验着每个来挑战九宫格益智游戏的艺人明星。想要攻略九宫格关卡，透过创意联想、逻辑推理、理性分析，才有机会获取智慧星币，带走梦幻大奖。

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Blue Mountains
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: The Pool
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: Turnip of Terror
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato, and the Veggies, who fall into the Deli Counter and come face-to-face with the Turnip of Terror. They escape with help from the not so scary Turnip.

programme.title: Tag's First Day
programme.desc: The Squirrels are crafting in the Clubhouse when Betty saves Tag from throwing water across the table instead of glitter.

programme.title: The Hat Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger interrupts the Squirrels' quiet time when he turns up to the Clubhouse with a magic hat on instead of his crown.

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Hailstorm
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters brand new click-on save the GoJet Academy from a glitched thunderstorm?

programme.title: Harbin Ice City, China
programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: White Cliffs of Dover, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.title: Valentina's Greek Vegetarian Moussaka
programme.desc: Valentina shows us how to make a very tasty Greek meal. Her delicious moussaka recipe is loaded with fresh vegetables and topped with green lentils that are packed with goodness.

programme.title: River Chub
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: Bowled Over
programme.desc: Sandy and Seaweed have invented a new game knocking down bottles with coconuts; they have called it 'Bowling'.

programme.title: Yowch
programme.desc: He-He and Krash are preparing a special tea party for Lily.

programme.title: Favourite Thing
programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: Daddy Dropoff
programme.desc: Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: Bingo
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Trolley Dash
programme.desc: Evil Pea causes chaos in the veggie aisle with a trolley loaded to the brim with stinky cheese. Supertato and Broccoli must use the Tato Car to get rid of the stink.

programme.title: Give It Back
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy both want a go with Tinky Winky's bag and start to squabble. The Noo-­‐noo sucks up the bag and only gives it back when Tinky Winky and Dipsy are ready to share.

programme.title: Egg
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'egg' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of eggs - a dippy egg, a fried egg, a gold egg and Dee and a friend even dress up as eggs.

programme.title: Itchy
programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: Panic at the Pumpkin Patch
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Svalbard Global Seed Vault, Norway
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble.

programme.title: The Adventure
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: Octopus
programme.desc: When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realize they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Andy and the African Elephants
programme.desc: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to the river Nile in search of some African elephants.

programme.title: Peas
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: The Dancing Bug Badge
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: The Teamwork Badge
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Hurricane Rescue
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Biogas Power
programme.desc: Greener fuel spells trouble for Glitch.

programme.title: Batucada
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas and Gabriela get ready for the Batucada carnival at the docks.

programme.title: Bags of Bags
programme.desc: Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search.

programme.title: Origami Overload
programme.desc: John has a problem with the origami flamingos he has made and needs Sarah and Duck's help.

programme.title: Delivery
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: Moon
programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.title: I Don't Like Bananas
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: It's Time for Lunar New Year
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: The Getting On Badge
programme.desc: When the squirrels upset the mole by being noisy, Duggee suggests some team building.

programme.title: I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Fatberg, London Sewers, England
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: Cabbage
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: Gooseberry
programme.desc: Gooseberry sings a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member

programme.title: Cereal Mountain
programme.desc: Chilli is determined to make it to the top of Cereal Mountain without the help of Supertato and his gadgets. Evil Pea tries to get there first by cheating.

programme.title: Dragon Boat Beats
programme.desc: The Supermarket is frozen over and Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Tomato practice for the boat race by using chopsticks for oars, but it doesn't go well as they're out of sync with each other.

programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Andy and the African Elephants
programme.desc: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to the river Nile in search of some African elephants.

programme.title: Peas

programme.title: The Dancing Bug Badge
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: The Teamwork Badge
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.desc: Greener fuel spells trouble for Glitch.

programme.title: Origami Overload
programme.desc: John has a problem with the origami flamingos he has made and needs Sarah and Duck's help.

programme.title: Delivery
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: Moon

programme.title: I Don't Like Bananas

programme.title: Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: The Wedding Badge

programme.desc: When the squirrels upset the mole by being noisy, Duggee suggests some team building.

programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: Give It Back
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy both want a go with Tinky Winky's bag and start to squabble. The Noo-­‐noo sucks up the bag and only gives it back when Tinky Winky and Dipsy are ready to share.

programme.title: Egg

programme.title: Itchy

programme.title: The Why Badge

programme.title: 中国文艺
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华民族传统文化、播撒五千年古老文明、关注中国与世界重大的文艺活动、用精彩的电视文艺作品为海内外华人观众打开一扇精神视窗为目标。

programme.title: 记住乡愁-片段展播
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: Budapest World Championship
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this special one hour episode, we see the best of the World Judo Championships from Budapest where everyone in the world swarms to witness the crowning of 14 world champions. Also, world renowned fighter Teddy Riner experiences his hardest title defense in his career.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: Fukuoka, Japan: Show 2
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Takakeisho, Mitakeumi, Shohozan and Meisei from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Venice Finals: Part 2
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Venice Qualifier tackle the Venice Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Rumbling Dice, Clear Climb and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: bodogFIGHT Season One Highlights
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all of the highlights from BodogFIGHT season one showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Victor Ortiz
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Timothy Bradley vs. Luis Carlos Abregu
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. programme.title: Biomechanics of Punches and Kicks

This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Kotoyuki, Asanoyama, Aoiyama and Ryuden from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Rusty Derouen
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector 'Macho' Camacho (46-3-0, 20 KO) battles Rusty Derouen (33-6-0, 25 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from Erie, Pennsylvania, USA.

programme.title: Adobo Ribs
programme.desc: Chef Deborah brings a Filipino classic to life with her adobo baby back ribs and pancit noodles, each with a Southern twist and inspired by a chef in Atlanta. She marinates the ribs and pan-fries them.

programme.desc: Rachael show how to take that favourite summer staple of grilled corn on the cob to a whole new level by combining it with spicy chilli and more, with her recipe for Mexican street corn pasta.

The first elimination is emotional, as the judges and contestants share their food dreams, and stories of how they got there. In 75 minutes, the contestants must cook a dish representing their food dream.

programme.title: Unusual Service
programme.desc: Your table is ready and it's time to get served in the most unusual ways. Join host Michael Yo's journey to Thailand for crispy flying fried chicken, then dinner is served with a side of sassy lip service.

programme.title: A Roommate To Die For

Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Burnley have won just one of their last nine home league games against Brighton (D5 L3), beating them 1-0 in December 2018 under Sean Dyche.

programme.title: PL Moments 2025/26
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.desc: Newcastle have lost just one of their last nine Premier League games against Crystal Palace (W4 D4), keeping a clean sheet in six of their last eight against the Eagles.

programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won their last two home league games against Aston Villa, last winning three in a row against them between 1977 and 1979.

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 香港爱情故事
programme.desc: 暖男设计师陈子朗(罗天宇饰)与理想主义女友邱凯琪(龚嘉欣饰)，是香港典型因土地问题而被迫流离浪荡的情侣。子朗两位妹妹陈子欣(王敏奕饰)和陈子婷(游嘉欣饰)性格极端，摄影师子欣沉沦于艺术家纪家希(谢东闵饰)的失乐园；品学兼优的大学女神子婷，爱之初体验以现实先行，两姐妹各有恋事。子朗、凯琪为觅安乐窝打拼，新婚后居于百多呎的劏房，除了要面对空间不足的生活磨擦外，还要处理双方父母的暮年感情危机！小两口排除万难，置业美梦却一夜变噩梦，为了一层楼竟忘记如何好好恋爱……_x000D_

programme.title: 点金胜手

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: Status Palsu Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh
programme.desc: Radit (Fendy Chow) runs away from home and is chased by his brother. Radit accidentally entered Rhea's (Yuriska Patricia) room to hide. Rhea, who was holding an engagement at her house, suddenly entered the room and shouted to see Radit.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Chicken Wings Senyumnya Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Marah
programme.desc: Desperate to escape an arranged marriage with Kelvin, Dinda (Jennifer Eve) runs away from home. While being chased by her father’s men, she spots an open car and hides inside. Little does she know, the car belongs to Baim (El Ryan Carlen), who happens to be Kelvin's best friend. Now, Dinda must navigate her feelings while staying hidden from those searching for her.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Kita Yang Kampung Tapi Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Jali (Kenny Austin) is a handsome young man with a secret: he hasn't been circumcised. Worried about his son’s future, his father, Babe Hai, comes up with a desperate plan to tie Jali to his bed and calls for a doctor. Enter Nadia (Jennifer Eve), a beautiful young doctor new to the village health clinic. Her presence causes a sensation, and she quickly goes viral, leading to a crowd of local men suddenly faking illnesses just to get a check-up from her.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cintaku Menyala Terus Gak Perlu Digas
programme.desc: A traumatic high school fire inspired Lista (Larasati Nugroho) to become a firefighter, all while secretly searching for the hero who saved her that day. During a rescue mission, Lista saves a young boy named Angga, who turns out to be the son of Gara (Ridho Illahi). When Gara reveals that he used to be a firefighter himself, Lista begins to wonder if she has finally found the person she’s been looking for.

programme.title: Status Palsu Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh
programme.desc: Radit (Fendy Chow) runs away from home and is chased by his brother. Radit accidentally entered Rhea's (Yuriska Patricia) room to hide. Rhea, who was holding an engagement at her house, suddenly entered the room and shouted to see Radit.

programme.title: DARI PADA DICUBIT IGUANA, LEBIH BAIK DICUBIT KAMU
programme.desc: To pursue her dream of becoming a singer, Pipit (Larasati Nugroho) always performs wearing a mask. Not only is she shy, but her father also forbids her from entering the music industry. At campus, Pipit-who works as a duck herder-is constantly bullied by everyone except for Feri (Ridho Ilahi).

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: How To Make King of Strawberry Sebelum Hari H
programme.desc: Refusing to marry the man her father chose, Sila (Shanice Margaretha) runs away and crosses paths with Rafan (Hardi Fadhillah). It’s love at first sight for her, but her father isn't giving up so easily. He has already prepared a scheme that is guaranteed to get under Rafan's skin and test their budding romance.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Chicken Wings Senyumnya Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Marah
programme.desc: Desperate to escape an arranged marriage with Kelvin, Dinda (Jennifer Eve) runs away from home. While being chased by her father’s men, she spots an open car and hides inside. Little does she know, the car belongs to Baim (El Ryan Carlen), who happens to be Kelvin's best friend. Now, Dinda must navigate her feelings while staying hidden from those searching for her.

programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十八集 这不是心动吧 “美少女壮士“群里资讯不断，见不了面，大家经常开视频聊天：陈氏夫妇感情回温，就是陈勉天天想吃包子，陈凯西做得快吐了；钟倾城跑步看片，积极充电；罗曼忙着转发求助和辟谣，团购物资支援各地，只有偶尔和方驰的聊天，会让她跳出焦虑。局势稳定父母回家，临行前打听方驰情况，罗曼大惊：丧心病狂了吧！方驰才多大！不想父母是打算介绍给她表妹。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十九集 斯人如彩虹 罗曼要搞定的帅哥医生就是方驰。没想到方驰以专心学习拒绝。方驰去露营，罗曼制造偶遇。方驰当做是约会，搭帐篷、生火做饭，上手就是三串一饼，罗曼将话题转到人生目标，试图用参加节目能提高自己的竞争力，与同门刘怡然竞争唯一留院名额，方驰反问她，妳的人生只有第一这个选项？罗曼从小被培养成夺冠赛犬，所有人只看她飞得多高，第一个关心她飞得累不累的，竟然是她以为的小孩，方驰。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 谢庭威卧底兰崖军团 三号车出警，锁匠拉杰正在和人吵架，对方被他推倒晕厥，拉杰被带回警署协助调查。上车前，拉杰告诉谢庭威，自己的父亲住院，急待汇钱救命，恳求谢庭威先放了自己，被庭威拒绝。晚上，谢庭威在自家餐厅看到新闻中提及，最近南亚裔给香港治安带来很大隐患，呼吁政府采取强硬措施。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 韦豪送钱迟了，振堂误会十七和桂婵不守约，迁怒于本已拿到通行证逃走的难民。韦豪赶到时，振堂已下令射杀一批难民，众人对他恨得咬牙切齿。四海偷偷拜祭死去的难民，更引发桂婵心中对振堂的愤恨，要与他拼个鱼死网破……回到租界，面对桂新串通六爷、八爷提出高价退股撤资，而四海极力想加入永业银行，桂婵统统回绝。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 暴徒打砸谢庭威中枪 救驾有功的谢庭威获得了巴朗的信任，何浩辉跟邵峰分析现在叫谢庭威归队有点可惜，会看紧庭威。何浩辉代替谢庭威到学校演讲，何乐轩十分骄傲。 关颖在棠哥家仍然和混混联系，凭借红姐对自己的喜爱管红姐要钱花。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 在混沌初开的世界中，真师虽神通广大却踪迹难寻。人羽两族长期争夺大陆统治权，战火不断。直到一名少年将军统合五族，建立大晁王朝。然而，夜北地区尚未被纳入大晁版图，各部族间争斗不息。夜北大渊古之女叶凌霜与朱颜公主七海蕊偷偷出游后回到部族，却受到不同的待遇。在秋选之日，突然出现的雪狼王引发混乱，大晁君主彧修明救下叶凌霜并欣赏她的勇气。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: iReunite With Missy
programme.desc: When Carly's old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly's best friend.

programme.title: iCarly Awards
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie present iCarly Awards for best user-generated content, giving the awards to the winners live on the web show. Spencer enlists European swimsuit models to help him make the awards statuettes.

programme.title: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, Andre and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: #GoomerSitting
programme.desc: When Sam and Cat agree to babysit Goomer while Dice goes away, they misapply Goomer's medication which causes him to temporarily lose his eyesight before a big match.

programme.title: Raph VS. Water
programme.desc: The Turtles and Mutanimals are caught in the Storm of the Century! But when a new group of SEA MUTANTS threaten the city... Raph will be forced to use his WORDS to save the day.

programme.title: Mikey Takes Charge
programme.desc: Mikey and Genghis Frog are sent into the storm on a supply run to the local market when they encounter the electrifying LEE THE EEL! Now Mikey has to step up and be a LEADER!

programme.title: Bubbletown / Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown... Bubbletown! // Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.title: Squirrel Jelly / The String
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick have their peaceful day of jelly fishing disturbed by Sandy's competitive nature. // SpongeBob pulls from Squidward's shirt a loose string that never seems to end.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Get Shirty / This Solves Nothing
programme.desc: Best and Bester decide to trick feuding magicians "Shouty Shirt & Abrakapants" into doing their act one last time. // Diamondo is holding a mystery dinner party, but Best and Bester solve a real mystery that is not part of the game.

programme.title: Rock-a-Bye Besty / Shake or Break
programme.desc: Best is too anxious to sleep, but Bester knows what to do. He needs to count sheep! Or count one sheep to be exact. // The twins help Flip Flop with her milkshake deliveries, but find one very difficult customer impossible to satisfy.

programme.title: Sea Haw / Li'l Past-cals
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a countrified variety show. // The Kelpbed Kids travel to the future to get their kicking can back.

programme.title: Zoo U / A Remembrance of Grand-Past
programme.desc: The Star family goes on a college tour for Patrick... at the zoo. // GrandPat shares his life stories to spoil every movie at the theater.

programme.title: Squirrel Jelly / The String
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick have their peaceful day of jelly fishing disturbed by Sandy's competitive nature. // SpongeBob pulls from Squidward's shirt a loose string that never seems to end.

programme.title: Sold!
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away - much to Squidward's delight.

programme.title: Prank U Next
programme.desc: Max seeks help dealing with a mystery prankster at school from his old principal, who was always the target of his pranks. But Max fails to stop the pranks and quits the mission, prompting Chloe to confess that she was the prankster all along.

programme.title: Radioactive Cat
programme.desc: Bose's Mom, Celia, picks up Schwoz's lost radioactive cat from outside SW.A.G. and takes it home, so Danger Force and Captain Man have to try and get it back before she goes nuclear.

programme.title: Love Bytes
programme.desc: Things get a little buggy when Schwoz installs a new operating system on the Man Cave Computer designed to detect and eliminate threats all over Swellview.

programme.title: Pulp Friction / Pets Peeved
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis. // When Lana brings home a new pet, who the kids adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

programme.title: InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: Bye, Bye, Birthday
programme.desc: Tired of the yearly cheer surrounding her birthday, Lucy casts a spell so her family will forget what day it is.

programme.title: Chatterbox Gary / Don't Feed the Clowns
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm. Everyone loves it... except for Squidward! // When a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: Goofy Scoopers / Pat the Dog
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick make it their mission to reunite the recently fires robot band from Goofy Goober's. // Patrick is sent to the pound for acting like a worm, but he won't be able to leave unless SpongeBob can train him.

programme.title: PL-1413
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces.

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: Safety Worst / De-Pat-ment Store
programme.desc: After yet another Star house disaster, the fire marshal forces Patrick to watch a safety training video. // Patrick fails his way up the corporate ladder at Upturn's mall.

programme.title: Pick Patrick's Path
programme.desc: The Lawnies vote for what Patrick does next.

programme.title: The Butterfly Effect / The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: Along Came a Sister / Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes' tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

programme.title: For Bros About to Rock / It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever. // Lincoln finds a letter in the attic leading him to believe there is money hidden within the Loud house!

programme.title: Toads and Tiaras / Two Boys and a Baby
programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

programme.title: Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: Just a Little Pipe Problem
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all.

programme.title: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?

programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Read Aloud / Not a Loud
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library but Lola refuses to participate. // When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.desc: Set against water scarcity, this film follows three people: Baskar, a desalination hopeful; Archana, his wife; Madan, an influencer. Together they triumph through clever plans.

programme.title: Mahanadhi Sagodharigalin Kadhai
programme.desc: When a family loses their father, the sole member of their lives, they take it as a challenge to rise back stronger in all situations.

programme.title: Sindhu Bairavi Kacheri Arambam
programme.desc: For her father's word, Bairavi ties the knot with Arumugam, while Siva rejects Sindhu's proposal yet ends up marrying her. How will these couples find solace?

programme.title: Azhagae Azhagu
programme.desc: Shanmugam reunites with his childhood sweetheart, hires her as a housemaid because she needs work. His wife protests when she learns of the arrangement tonight.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to save her family.

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Thirty years after their last title fight, two retired boxers and lifelong rivals decide to step into the ring once more to settle an old score.

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: An uncontrollable demonic wraith mixes the quick and dead with a laugh and a fright in this comic fantasy.

programme.title: Young Adult
programme.desc: When things are no longer what they used to be, a former prom queen and her friend realise that it is time for them to grow up.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question his mission and his being.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: The War Of The Rohirrim
programme.desc: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim tells the fate of the House of Helm Hammerhand, the legendary King of Rohan.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three divorced women seek revenge on the husbands who left them for younger women.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: After the slaughter of his family by stone-cold mercenary, Hanzo Hasashi is exiled to the Netherrealm, where he's given a chance to avenge his family - and is resurrected as Scorpion, a lost soul bent on revenge.

programme.title: Young Adult
programme.desc: When things are no longer what they used to be, a former prom queen and her friend realise that it is time for them to grow up.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十八集 这不是心动吧 “美少女壮士“群里资讯不断，见不了面，大家经常开视频聊天：陈氏夫妇感情回温，就是陈勉天天想吃包子，陈凯西做得快吐了；钟倾城跑步看片，积极充电；罗曼忙着转发求助和辟谣，团购物资支援各地，只有偶尔和方驰的聊天，会让她跳出焦虑。局势稳定父母回家，临行前打听方驰情况，罗曼大惊：丧心病狂了吧！方驰才多大！不想父母是打算介绍给她表妹。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十九集 斯人如彩虹 罗曼要搞定的帅哥医生就是方驰。没想到方驰以专心学习拒绝。方驰去露营，罗曼制造偶遇。方驰当做是约会，搭帐篷、生火做饭，上手就是三串一饼，罗曼将话题转到人生目标，试图用参加节目能提高自己的竞争力，与同门刘怡然竞争唯一留院名额，方驰反问她，妳的人生只有第一这个选项？罗曼从小被培养成夺冠赛犬，所有人只看她飞得多高，第一个关心她飞得累不累的，竟然是她以为的小孩，方驰。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 谢庭威卧底兰崖军团 三号车出警，锁匠拉杰正在和人吵架，对方被他推倒晕厥，拉杰被带回警署协助调查。上车前，拉杰告诉谢庭威，自己的父亲住院，急待汇钱救命，恳求谢庭威先放了自己，被庭威拒绝。晚上，谢庭威在自家餐厅看到新闻中提及，最近南亚裔给香港治安带来很大隐患，呼吁政府采取强硬措施。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 韦豪送钱迟了，振堂误会十七和桂婵不守约，迁怒于本已拿到通行证逃走的难民。韦豪赶到时，振堂已下令射杀一批难民，众人对他恨得咬牙切齿。四海偷偷拜祭死去的难民，更引发桂婵心中对振堂的愤恨，要与他拼个鱼死网破……回到租界，面对桂新串通六爷、八爷提出高价退股撤资，而四海极力想加入永业银行，桂婵统统回绝。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 山河枕

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 暴徒打砸谢庭威中枪 救驾有功的谢庭威获得了巴朗的信任，何浩辉跟邵峰分析现在叫谢庭威归队有点可惜，会看紧庭威。何浩辉代替谢庭威到学校演讲，何乐轩十分骄傲。 关颖在棠哥家仍然和混混联系，凭借红姐对自己的喜爱管红姐要钱花。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 在混沌初开的世界中，真师虽神通广大却踪迹难寻。人羽两族长期争夺大陆统治权，战火不断。直到一名少年将军统合五族，建立大晁王朝。然而，夜北地区尚未被纳入大晁版图，各部族间争斗不息。夜北大渊古之女叶凌霜与朱颜公主七海蕊偷偷出游后回到部族，却受到不同的待遇。在秋选之日，突然出现的雪狼王引发混乱，大晁君主彧修明救下叶凌霜并欣赏她的勇气。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Indian Wells
programme.desc: Tie Break Tens is a fast-paced, knockout tennis format featuring exclusively 10-point tiebreak matches with no games or sets. The first player to reach 10 points with a two-point advantage wins the match. Introduced in 2015, it is a short-format tennis partner of the ITF often featuring top professional players

programme.title: U.S. Men's Clay Court C'ship (250) Day 1 R1 Session 1
programme.desc: The U.S. Men's Clay Court Championships is an annual ATP Tour 250 tennis tournament held at the River Oaks Country Club in Houston, Texas. Founded in 1910, it is the only remaining tournament in the United States played on clay courts.

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: This show brings you compelling stories, player personalities, tournament colour and fan engagement as well as exclusive analysis of statistical trends and data.

programme.title: Abierto Mexicano Telcel p/b HSBC
programme.desc: A look back from the largest ATP Tour venue in Latin America at the Arena GNP Seguros.

programme.title: Episode 39
programme.desc: Catch all the happenings in and around the world of badminton here on the show Badminton Unlimited.

programme.title: Dubai Duty Free Tennis Championships
programme.desc: A look back at the 34th edition of one of the most popular tournament stops of the ATP World Tour at the Dubai Duty Free Tennis Stadium.

programme.title: Upper Austria Ladies Linz (500) Final
programme.desc: The Upper Austria Ladies Linz is a professional women's tennis tournament in the WTA Tour, first held in 1987. It is held at the Design Center Linz in Austria, featuring top-ranked players on indoor surfaces.

programme.title: Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters (1000) Final
programme.desc: The Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters is a premier annual men's professional tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Monte Carlo Country Club in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin, France.

programme.title: Finals
programme.desc: The 2026 European Badminton Championships is the 32nd edition of the continental championship and will be held in Huelva, Spain. The tournament is used to determine the European champion in all five categories (Men’s Singles/Doubles, Women’s Singles/Doubles, Mixed Doubles).

programme.title: Season 3 Episode 6
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell (500) Day 1 Round 1
programme.desc: The Barcelona Open is a prestigious annual ATP Tour 500 men's tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Real Club de Tenis Barcelona-1899 in Spain. Founded in 1953, it is a key European clay-court event and serves as a significant precursor to the French Open.

programme.title: Season 3 Episode 7
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: Season 3 Episode 8
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: 1st Round Qualifiers H/Ls Show
programme.desc: Catch all the triumphant moments from the 13 winning teams who are through to the second round of qualifiers.

programme.title: Miami Open presented by Itau
programme.desc: A look back at the 41st edition of the second event of the "Sunshine Double" from the hardcourts at the Hard Rock Stadium in Miami, Florida.

programme.title: The Missing Piece / The Scotchman
programme.desc: Archibald goes on a scavenger hunt for a missing puzzle piece. Archibald marches to a creepy house to deliver a package.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unhelpful Queen
programme.desc: One of the Knights has tried a magic spell but it went wrong and he's shrunk! Queen Sparklewings could help him but she's hiding and won't come out. It's up to Noddy to investigate and work out why the Queen is hiding and how to persuade her to help the Knight grow again.

programme.title: The Case Of The Mystery Artist
programme.desc: There's a mystery in Toyland! All the toys have drawn pictures of Deltoid but they've all been scribbled on and ruined! Noddy opens the investigation to find out who is the mystery artist. Using his wwwbook to follow the clues, Noddy realises that it's Deltoid who was drawing on all the pictures because he didn't think any of them look like him! Noddy suggests that they draw pictures again - and this time Deltoid can draw his own picture too. Clever Noddy's saved the day!

programme.title: The Case Of Bling's Hidden Present
programme.desc: It's Bling's birthday and she is so excited that she keeps opening all her presents before her party. Noddy needs to make sure she doesn't open the storybook present from him and Big Ears early - but he's got to find it first! Big Ears has hidden it and can't remember where he's put it! Noddy launches his investigation to find the missing present before Bling does. Using his investigating skills Noddy follows the clues all over Toyland to find the present before the impatient little Naughticorn.

programme.title: The Case Of The Big Wall Of Bricks
programme.desc: Fuse has a new electronic ball. Noddy suggests that they invite everyone to play with it later. Fuse agrees but when Noddy returns with the other toys there is a big brick wall in front of the workshop. No one can get in and there's no sign of Fuse! Noddy uses all his investigating skills to follow the clues. He discovers that Fuse built the brick wall to stop his friends coming into the workshop because he was worried his new electronic ball might get broken.

programme.title: Why Leopard Has Spots
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Leopard didn't have spots. All the animals had something special; Lion had his mane, Peacock his beautiful tail, Zebra his stripes… but Leopard was as plain as plain can be. Then one day Leopard made friends with Puff Adder with his bright colourful spots. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Hyena Has Short Back Legs
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hyena didn't have short back legs. He was always chasing around and nipping other animals on the bottom. Then one day the animals had enough. It was time to teach that naughty Hyena a lesson! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat's Camping Chaos
programme.desc: Lauren and Sara lead a camping trip to the Scottish Highlands, but disaster strikes when Ajay and PC Selby are stuck in Pencaster with the tent and cooking equipment. Pat must transport them to the Highlands in the SDS Plane and put up the tent before nightfall in order to accomplish his mission.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The King's Armour
programme.desc: It's Knights and Dragons Day at school and Pat has to travel to a Welsh castle to pick up some ancient artefacts and Sarah Gilbertson's Auntie Jackie! Pat is rather partial to a suit of armour - and when he's presented with a real one at the castle, he can't resist trying it on! But the suit gets stuck shut, leaving the excitable children wondering where their artefacts are!

programme.title: Horse Powered Dinkie
programme.desc: Farmer Green tells the cars about olden days, when the only transport was horse and cart. Maxi and Drifter say they would never be seen travelling that slow… or would they?

programme.title: FB's Sleepover
programme.desc: FB is excited about his sleepover with the other cars in the workshop but when the night draws in he is unsure of his unfamiliar surroundings. Big Chris helps set him at his ease

programme.title: Cici Spectacular
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has asked CiCi to perform one of her stunts in front of a big crowd. CiCi is very nervous and Roary does his best to help his friend prepare for the event.

programme.title: Cry Cold
programme.desc: Big Chris is feeling ill so Marsha sends him to bed until he is better. Big Chris enjoys the attention rather too much and fails to let everyone know when he is on the mend.

programme.title: The Case Of The Toyland Mischief Maker
programme.desc: When Big Ears' teapot goes missing, Noddy is surprised to find it hanging from a lamp post. And when Bumpy's kennel goes missing too, it's clear there's a mischief maker in Toyland. Noddy needs to investigate before Toyland descends into chaos. Using his investigating kit and with Revs and Bumpy to help, Noddy discovers that it was the Naughticorns playing a game of Dare and daring each other to do silly things.

programme.title: The Case Of The Popping Balloons
programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are each given a balloon at the end of Smartysaurus's Science Party. But when lots of the balloons start going pop, Noddy decides to investigate why. Realising that someone must be hiding and popping them, he follows the clues to PatPat and then to the Naughticorns before eventually working out that the balloon poppers are the Ninjas.

programme.title: The Case Of The Pink Lettuces
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening at the farm - all Farmer Tom's lettuces have been painted pink! Farmer Tom is really upset so Noddy offers to investigate. After talking to PatPat and Smartysaurus he realises that the Ninjas had asked Smartysaurus to make them pink paint so that they could paint the lettuces. They were using them as pom-poms to cheerlead Pink Ninja as she ran the Toyland Marathon Race! The Ninjas are very sorry that they upset Farmer Tom but he tells them that it's alright.

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Jigsaw Puzzle Pieces
programme.desc: When some pieces from Big Ears' jigsaw puzzle go missing, Noddy investigates: where are the missing pieces? He soon realises someone must have taken them and draws up a list of suspects. Having discounted the Pirates and then the Naughticorns, Noddy is baffled. But when Pat-Pat and the Pockets invite him to share a piece of toy cake, Noddy suddenly has a breakthrough: maybe it wasn't one toy who took lots of pieces but lots of toys who each took one piece.

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Double Finked
programme.desc: Magnus's nephew, Axel, arrives on the island and tells the Rescue Riders that he wants to join their team. But is he just a trickster like his uncle?

programme.title: Divewings
programme.desc: When sea-dwelling dragons called Divewings start attacking ships near the island, the Rescue Riders have to find out what's making them so upset.

programme.title: An Inconvenient Tooth / Up, Up and Away
programme.desc: After Lula loses her loose tooth in the park, Team Zenko must find the missing molar and get it under Lula’s pillow in time for the Tooth Fairy’s visit. / Gabriel and Luis show off their new drone but it crash lands on the roof top. Team Zenko's mission is to try and get it back, but Yolanda won't give up her new hi-tech friend that easily.

programme.title: Lucky Penny / Hammy’s Day Out
programme.desc: Marcus has a piano recital and unknowingly forgets his lucky penny at home. Now it’s up to the Dew Drops to get the penny across town and back into Marcus’ pocket before showtime. / When Nicholas rolls the hamster ball (with Hammy inside) out into the streets, the Dew Drops must get Hammy back home safely.

programme.title: The Case Of The Toyland Mischief Maker
programme.desc: When Big Ears' teapot goes missing, Noddy is surprised to find it hanging from a lamp post. And when Bumpy's kennel goes missing too, it's clear there's a mischief maker in Toyland. Noddy needs to investigate before Toyland descends into chaos. Using his investigating kit and with Revs and Bumpy to help, Noddy discovers that it was the Naughticorns playing a game of Dare and daring each other to do silly things.

He soon realises someone must have taken them and draws up a list of suspects. Having discounted the Pirates and then the Naughticorns, Noddy is baffled. But when Pat-Pat and the Pockets invite him to share a piece of toy cake, Noddy suddenly has a breakthrough: maybe it wasn't one toy who took lots of pieces but lots of toys who each took one piece.

programme.title: Cupcake Tree
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: The Fairy Festival!
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Salty and Sweet / Cruz Blues
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Pet Sitters / Narwhalicorn Day
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: The Trouble with Kibbles / Road to Kindness
programme.desc: When Tag asks Mom to be the pilot for the upcoming Dogcaththlon race, Mom isn’t sure she is ready. Until Paw reminds her of the day she saved Pawston! Mom tells the story of how she used her blimp to save the city from an eruption at the kibble factory. / Pawston is hosting a Roller Disco Night in the park, but Frank isn't allowed to attend due to last year's poor behavior. Tag convinces Mayor Sniffington to let Frank come to the party if he passes Leo's Road to Kindness.

programme.title: How Tag Got Her Tag / Blankie Blaster
programme.desc: It’s Show and Tell Day for the Race Cadets! Tag decides to talk about how she got the race flag tag on her collar, but realizes she doesn’t know the real story of how she got it. Her family launches into an epic retelling of how Tag got her tag. / Spike is about to launch into space when he calls Tag in a panic to tell her that he left his special blankie behind! He can’t sleep without it! Tag, Grandmaw, and Grandpaw race off to the rocket launch to try and get it back to him.

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: The Dinotrux crew builds an aqueduct to bring water back to the Flatirons during a drought, but D-Structs tries to sabotage their plan.

programme.title: Lucky and the Doubtful Drought
programme.desc: When Grayson has the only working well during an unexpected heat wave, Lucky has to find an alternate source of water

programme.title: Bait With Destiny / Sappy Together
programme.desc: Eep gets jealous when Thunk is invited to join the hunters/Grug and Gran must work together after getting stuck to each other with sticky tree sap

programme.title: Scare Tactics / Disturbiahhh!
programme.desc: Grug has Thunk use "scare tactics" to get the Valley to defend against the Broods/Eep thinks Snoot is holding Ahhh! Valleyites captive in his cave

programme.title: Have Dragon Will Travel Pt 2
programme.desc: Heather joins the Dragon Riders, but it's not an easy alliance, especially when Hiccup uncovers a shocking secret about her true identity.

programme.title: The Next Big Sting
programme.desc: Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders rescue a wounded Speed Stinger and take it back to Dragon's Edge, unaware of the dangers that follow.

programme.title: The Knight's Fall - Part 2
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: The Liar and The Thief
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: Tim and Boss Baby want to bond with Dad by recreating a perfect "Dudes Weekend' camping trip, culminating in a photo opp, but everything seems to go wrong

programme.title: Play It Again, Tim
programme.desc: When Tim is forced to take piano lessons, he actually enjoys them and Boss Baby realizes that Tim is being brainwashed by his piano teacher, slowly turning Tim into an old man

programme.title: Research & Developments
programme.desc: Turtleneck wants to crack the Stinkless Serum formula and makes it a competition, pitting worker babies against worker babies, stating that the first one to the Serum will be the new CEO!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bombastic Blathering of Brainy Blabulous
programme.desc: When Krupp transfers to another school, George and Harold follow, only to find a bizarro version of Jerome Horwitz Elementary, where the teachers are nice and the kids are well-behaved. But no one's having any fun! George and Harold want to right this wrong with pranks and comics. But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Crazy Caustic Spray of the Contagious Cruelius Sneezer
programme.desc: In order to spice up their field trip to Romeinday (an ancient Rome reenactment park), George and Harold trick Melvin into turning the bus into a time machine so they can travel to actual ancient Rome and be gladiators. After offending Caesar with their comic, the emperor is accidentally turned into Cruelius Sneezer and pursues the school group with all his might.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Trashy Tale of the Tumultuous Tubbadump
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: The Eye of the Sahara
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: RoboCleve
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela.

programme.title: Sirocco Fire Explosion
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded - is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Midnight Scrum
programme.desc: When Viggo puts a bounty on Hiccup's head, every Dragon Hunter in the world is after capturing Hiccup, so Toothless and the Riders must rescue him.

programme.title: Not Lout
programme.desc: When Snotlout screws up a mission, he must learn to be a leader and earn the trust of the other riders.

programme.title: Saving Shattermaster
programme.desc: When Mala and the Defenders of the Wing find a mysterious stranger who looks suspiciously like Dagur, Hiccup and Heather go to investigate.

programme.title: Bad Coffee
programme.desc: When Strickler tempts Jim to use dark magic in his training, it hits the school faculty in an unexpected way!

programme.title: So I'm Dating A Sorceress
programme.desc: Jim and his friends decide to take a night off for a double date, only to discover an uninvited fifth wheel.

programme.title: She Who Walks In The Shadows
programme.desc: When Jim discovers Claire’s sickness is much different than an average cold, they must traverse into the dangerous Shadow Realm to save her life.

programme.title: Mister Mastodon
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Hide The Lightning
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: The Wrong Daughter
programme.desc: Kate and Joe are considering in-vitro options when a child Kate gave up 17 years ago resurfaces. Danica moves in with Kate and as time passes, cracks begin to appear, is she really Kate's daughter?

programme.title: Pretty Cheaters, Deadly Lies
programme.desc: After being tricked into a compromising situation, high school senior Hannah Fletcher thinks she can stop her cousin Madison’s blackmail by taking her college entrance exam for her. But nothing is enough for Madison, and her plans soon become deadly…
