programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十八集 这不是心动吧 “美少女壮士“群里资讯不断，见不了面，大家经常开视频聊天：陈氏夫妇感情回温，就是陈勉天天想吃包子，陈凯西做得快吐了；钟倾城跑步看片，积极充电；罗曼忙着转发求助和辟谣，团购物资支援各地，只有偶尔和方驰的聊天，会让她跳出焦虑。局势稳定父母回家，临行前打听方驰情况，罗曼大惊：丧心病狂了吧！方驰才多大！不想父母是打算介绍给她表妹。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十九集 斯人如彩虹 罗曼要搞定的帅哥医生就是方驰。没想到方驰以专心学习拒绝。方驰去露营，罗曼制造偶遇。方驰当做是约会，搭帐篷、生火做饭，上手就是三串一饼，罗曼将话题转到人生目标，试图用参加节目能提高自己的竞争力，与同门刘怡然竞争唯一留院名额，方驰反问她，妳的人生只有第一这个选项？罗曼从小被培养成夺冠赛犬，所有人只看她飞得多高，第一个关心她飞得累不累的，竟然是她以为的小孩，方驰。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 谢庭威卧底兰崖军团 三号车出警，锁匠拉杰正在和人吵架，对方被他推倒晕厥，拉杰被带回警署协助调查。上车前，拉杰告诉谢庭威，自己的父亲住院，急待汇钱救命，恳求谢庭威先放了自己，被庭威拒绝。晚上，谢庭威在自家餐厅看到新闻中提及，最近南亚裔给香港治安带来很大隐患，呼吁政府采取强硬措施。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 韦豪送钱迟了，振堂误会十七和桂婵不守约，迁怒于本已拿到通行证逃走的难民。韦豪赶到时，振堂已下令射杀一批难民，众人对他恨得咬牙切齿。四海偷偷拜祭死去的难民，更引发桂婵心中对振堂的愤恨，要与他拼个鱼死网破……回到租界，面对桂新串通六爷、八爷提出高价退股撤资，而四海极力想加入永业银行，桂婵统统回绝。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 暴徒打砸谢庭威中枪 救驾有功的谢庭威获得了巴朗的信任，何浩辉跟邵峰分析现在叫谢庭威归队有点可惜，会看紧庭威。何浩辉代替谢庭威到学校演讲，何乐轩十分骄傲。 关颖在棠哥家仍然和混混联系，凭借红姐对自己的喜爱管红姐要钱花。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 在混沌初开的世界中，真师虽神通广大却踪迹难寻。人羽两族长期争夺大陆统治权，战火不断。直到一名少年将军统合五族，建立大晁王朝。然而，夜北地区尚未被纳入大晁版图，各部族间争斗不息。夜北大渊古之女叶凌霜与朱颜公主七海蕊偷偷出游后回到部族，却受到不同的待遇。在秋选之日，突然出现的雪狼王引发混乱，大晁君主彧修明救下叶凌霜并欣赏她的勇气。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 山歌恋
programme.desc: 牧羊女古秀秀喜唱山歌，父亲嗜赌如命；青年刘大龙与秀对唱山歌，情愫互生。曾老虎以追债要胁古老头许婚；刘欲酬钱替秀父还债。怎知帆船归来而刘却失踪！秀无奈答允出嫁...

programme.title: 恶霸
programme.desc: 年轻有为的侦缉队长召集两名狱卒，协助他对付经营赌博的黑帮。

programme.title: 布衣神相
programme.desc: 东瀛甲派忍者血洗武当，并命人污蔑于无敌门掌门独孤无敌。云飞扬练成天蚕神功后，决意为武当报仇，挑战独孤无敌，但却被打败至重伤。幸得布衣神相李布衣所助，伤患得以复原，才能逃避忍者的追杀。

programme.title: 儿女是我们的
programme.desc: 富家小姐梅淑卿与穷教师江少文，为了自由恋爱，脱离父母，从城市迁往小镇结婚生活。他们生育五个儿女，但生存的担子日重，二人长期辛劳，终相继亡故。小儿女顿失庇荫，直接面对复杂的社会，几乎各散东西......

programme.title: 锦衣卫
programme.desc: 明朝时，英宗昏庸无能，大权落入刘永饰的宦官之手，他利用锦衣卫诛杀异己；然梁家仁饰的锦衣卫统领却义释忠良。其父在宦官胁迫下被迫追杀亲子...

programme.title: 欲焰狂流
programme.desc: 故事描述饰花花公子的乔庄与好友杨帆，同时爱上胡燕妮，但杨成人之美。但乔因生殖力弱，故当胡怀孕时，就怀疑妻与杨有染...

programme.title: 射雕英雄传第三集
programme.desc: 郭靖和黄蓉为探寻武穆遗书而前往铁掌山。铁掌帮帮主裘千仞发现二人行踪后，把黄蓉打至重伤，但黄蓉的伤势却只有南帝段智兴才能治好。究竟黄蓉能否及时就医？

programme.title: 双星伴月
programme.desc: 乡村少女阿娇、流浪汉大傻、收山老倌二叔公三人同住危楼，生活清苦但互相扶持。其后阿娇被捧为歌星，从此飞黄腾达，但她却渐渐发觉自己失去了最重要的东西...

programme.title: 龙门金剑
programme.desc: 白玉龙找寻失踪的父亲白震东，与丐帮帮主安乐天的义女魏金凤日久生情，终于在金剑庄成婚。婚后不久，玉龙竟被「龙门宫」的人捉去。白父曾和其宫主龙仙子结婚，诞下玉龙，现龙七姑迫玉龙遵守宫规和月兰结婚！玉龙逃回金剑庄，龙仙子至，母子相认，仙子召集门人，决意将宫规废除！

programme.title: 女秀才
programme.desc: 闻蜚蛾自幼女扮男装从父习武，后更考得秀才功名，堪称文武全才。同窗好友杜子中与魏撰之虽与蜚蛾日夕相对，均不知其是女儿身。闻母见女儿年纪不小，不该再扮男装，劝蜚蛾选撰之或子中为夫婿。不料蜚娥与二人情谊相同，一时无法抉择，遂决定由天定夺，怎知阴差阳错，选婿之箭落于撰之手中。蜚娥后悔不已，才知自己意属子中...

programme.title: 铁观音
programme.desc: 女警探艾丝化身成走私犯秃子的情妇，与魔女党的程铁虎认识。艾丝潜入魔女党总部，取得首领黑寡妇信任。不料秃子越狱，艾丝身份被揭露，铁虎冒死将艾丝救出，艾丝遥见黑寡妇率众跳上快艇逃走，艾丝埋下的定时炸弹爆炸，快艇炸成粉碎...

programme.title: 宋宫秘史
programme.desc: 包公发现刘妃在二十年前为保其位而谋害李妃，将李妃刚诞下的儿子调走后，把她逐出皇宫。于是，包公用妙计诱大太监郭槐认罪，揭发当年他与刘妃合谋陷害李妃之奸计，并将刘妃定罪。而李妃也被接回皇宫，与已为皇帝的儿子团聚。

programme.title: 断肠剑
programme.desc: 李岳为报父仇暗杀高官后遭通缉，隐姓埋名成为逃犯。他的未婚妻贞儿委托暗恋她的剑客方君兆寻找爱郎，却不知女盗贼小眉早已对李岳暗生情愫。他们错综复杂的爱情四角关系展现出无悔的割舍、付出与无私而伟大的情感。

programme.title: Zara Hatke Zara Bachke
programme.desc: Kapil and Somya are a happily married couple who live in a joint family and decide to get a divorce. Things don't go as planned as their family gets to know of it, and thus begins a comedy of errors.

programme.title: The Diplomat

programme.title: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun - Part 2
programme.desc: When Peggy, Marcy and the neighborhood girls drop in on a male strip joint, Marcy loses more than her innocence.

programme.title: What Makes Darrin Run?
programme.desc: Endora casts an ''ambition" spell on Darrin almost breaking up a friendship and a business association.

programme.title: Evil Under the Sun (Part 2)
programme.desc: While Poirot is on holiday in Iraq, the wife of the head scientist at an archaeological dig confides to him that she is the target of threatening letters.

programme.title: The Secret
programme.desc: Convinced he was adopted, young Jim-Bob Walton searches for the truth about his birth and finds it shrouded in mystery.

programme.title: Locum
programme.desc: A foster couple call Detectives Benson and Stabler to the scene of the crime when their ten-year-old adopted daughter disappears.

programme.title: 军火大劫案
programme.desc: 特工阿文被安排潜伏于东南亚的军火商旗下，寻找其手中的一批军火炸药并将其销毁。当他终于找到该批军火后，却遭到不明匪徒袭击。为防止灾难发生，阿文决定与他的特工搭档阿琼合力夺回军火。

programme.title: 女人心
programme.desc: 有妇之夫孙子威与莉发展婚外情，其妻宝儿忍无可忍，决定离婚。分居后，宝儿认识一群独身但不甘寂寞的女人，经常聚会，各自各精彩！子威后来发觉自己最爱的依然是宝儿，二人决定复合。怎料在庆祝复合的晚会上，二人经过一场争吵，竟宣布第二度离异...

programme.title: 龙的传人
programme.desc: 青年周小龙离开纯朴的离岛到香港发展。他的师叔欺骗小龙参加桌球比赛，并以他父亲的地皮作为赌注。小龙最后输掉了比赛，幸得他青梅竹马的朋友毛毛鼓励，把自家的田地也作为赌注。小龙最后能否把自己的土地赢回来？

programme.title: 僵尸叔叔
programme.desc: 偏僻山间，一僧一道比邻而居。和尚（午马 饰）随和开朗，更有一女徒菁菁（李丽珍 饰）玲珑可爱；道士（陈友 饰）古板严厉，而徒弟嘉乐（钱嘉乐 饰）却鬼马顽皮。性格不同的两个师傅口角不断，大斗其法，两个冤家徒弟也搞笑连连，笑料频出。

programme.title: 我爱神仙遮
programme.desc: 推土车司机阿成，在工作时忽遇地陷而堕入一地下古庙，无意中成为油纸伞妖的主人。她更将自己现身的秘密及超凡的法力告知阿成。地盘工目凡叔嗜赌，欠下恶少高利贷，恶少垂涎凡叔之女美色，要凡叔以女还债；阿成得悉后请伞妖戏弄恶少，并暗助凡叔在赌场获胜，清还债项。惟此神伞之秘密却被恶少发现...

programme.title: 纸人回魂
programme.desc: 一位记者调查二十年前纸人回魂案时，听到三个关于恐怖纸人的故事。故事起源于乔府大小姐乔媛媛枉死后，管家请纸扎匠为小姐做了纸人陪葬。纸人被点眼睛后，大小姐得以借纸人回魂复仇，更接二连三引发连串与纸人有关的骇人听闻事件。

programme.title: 一代宗师
programme.desc: 这部史诗式动作电影是由著名电影人王家卫执导。故事始于佛山，当时年迈的北方功夫宗师宫羽田公开挑战南方宗师叶问。叶问最终胜出，但后来输给宫羽田的女儿宫二，二人却因此结下情缘...

programme.title: 卧虎藏龙
programme.desc: 剑侠李慕白将绝世宝剑「青冥剑」托付王爷府保管，岂料竟遭玉娇龙盗去。这位出身高贵却武艺超凡的玉娇龙，师从邪道「碧眼狐狸」。李慕白惜其才华，屡次欲导其向善而未果，二人终究难逃命运纠缠，注定共赴悲剧。

programme.title: 七小福
programme.desc: 本片是改编自京剧大师于占元师傅的真实故事。六十年代戏剧文化日渐衰落，但于师傅仍坚持要保留他的戏剧学院。三个少年决意入读于师傅的戏剧研究学院，向他拜师学艺，经过艰辛的训练过程后，于师傅终于成功造就香港影坛这三大巨星。

programme.title: 少年陈真之乱世英雄
programme.desc: 电影讲述清末上海的小人物陈真，在经历苦难及面对无数挑战后，蜕变成长为民族英雄的故事。

programme.title: 我爱罗兰度
programme.desc: Lolanto自命风流，一次因伤入院结识了富商的弱智独生女儿阿蚊，她如小孩般天真可爱，渐渐更与Lolanto成为好友。蚊父因此聘请Lolanto来照顾她。不久，蚊入院做智力恢复手术，但恢复智力后的阿蚊与Lolanto建立的情谊却黯然离去...

programme.title: 激战
programme.desc: 曾经叱咤世界拳坛的拳王程辉，在澳门遇见了热血青年思齐。随着他训练思齐备战即将举行的混合格斗赛，程辉不仅重燃了对拳击的热爱，还重新找回了对生命的热情，并更加珍惜那些在生命中真正重要的人。

programme.title: 蛊
programme.desc: 故事描述黄锦燊饰的督察查出女童被杀案的凶手，竟为其父艾飞；艾狱中求见黄，告知曾在某地邂逅一女子，获赠颈饰，自此，林突感有性无能之趋向，而其女忽嗜生肉，并数次有伤害林之意图，友人劝其赴巫婆处占算，巫婆算出其女系邪魔入体，必须以九寸钉钉在头上将其钉死，林即在此不可思议力量作崇之下，将亲女钉死；黄赴某地查探线索，并从神媒查出艾中了尸油降，唯神媒法力不足，不能查出谁为降头师，嘱黄往一百里外之古刹，览高僧温马达摩求助...

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Skate Park / The Crew Builds A Tunnel
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Beaver Home / The Crew Fixes A Road
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: Dora & Diego Rescue Baby Jaguar / Diego's Awesome Owl Adventure
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego rescue a baby jaguar after it gets lost deep in the rainforest. // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a baby burrowing owl find its parents and make it home.

programme.title: Dora And Diego and the Big Boy Bears! / Journey to Lizard Island
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego help a pair of spectacled bear brothers build an awesome nest for their Mami! // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a lost, baby lizard get home to its parents!

programme.title: Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: Making Bread / From One Pit to Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: The Tenderest Bond of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: It's Only a Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Popcorn Cafe / The Crew Fixes A Slippery Mess
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew switch to cleanup mode when construction on Cafe Carl's new popcorn restaurant pops out of control. // A soapy accident causes slippery mayhem all over Builder Cove. Can the pups clean it up in time for Mayor Greatway's big jump?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasure
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: Pups Save a Pop Star / Pups Save the Meditation Dome
programme.desc: Skye, Liberty, Everest and Ranger Aspen head off on a road trip in the Adventure RV to attend a desert concert by their favorite Pop Star, Sierra Sparkle. // There's a new Meditation Dome in Adventure Bay, and Priya is teaching her very first class!

programme.title: Pups Stop a Coconut Catapult / Pups Save Humdinger's Goose
programme.desc: The pups leap into action when Digi and Tal's coconut catapult goes out-of-control and rockets off through the jungle targeting birds and monkeys. // When a baby goose hatches in Humdinger's lair, the little bird mistakes the mayor for his new mama!

programme.title: The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.title: Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: The Bunny Boyz / Dancing Osito
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help the Bunny Boyz boy band get super clean and sparkly before their big show! // Dora and Boots track down Osito, Isabela's lost teddy bear, and get him back before she wakes up.

programme.title: Robots to the Rescue
programme.desc: When three big emergencies turn out to be too much for one truck alone, Blaze turns himself and his friends into super strong robots to save Axle City from a runaway train, an overflowing glue factory, and an erupting volcano!

programme.title: Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Big Rig to the Rescue!
programme.desc: When three big deliveries are needed all over Axle City, there's only one monster machine with the power to haul it all: Big Rig Blaze! But even Big Rig Blaze may not be able to make all the deliveries in time.

programme.title: The Amazing Stunt Kitty
programme.desc: When a big stunt goes awry, Darington is sent flying away on an out-of-control balloon! Now, it's up to Blaze, AJ, and Darington's sidekick Stunt Kitty to save the day!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Solar-Powered Bus / The Crew Builds A Lifeguard Tower
programme.desc: When Speed Meister steals Rubble & Crew's bus, the pups have to stop it in time for Sierra Sparkle's big concert! // It's the perfect beach day in Builder Cove! If Rubble & Crew can build a lifeguard tower so the beach can open...

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic / The Crew Builds A Mermaid Party
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Lily's mermaid-themed birthday party is called off when it starts to rain. Time for a construction solution!

programme.title: Pups Save Bedtime / Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the Paw Patrol, but their phone cut out! // Chickaletta has laid an egg, but it's rolled away and is heading through town. The Paw Patrol has to catch it before it breaks.

programme.title: Pups Save a Manatee / Pups Save Breakfast
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp. // Mr. Porter and Alex are in a sticky situation - they're up to their ears in maple syrup! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the Porter's and Breakfast!

programme.title: Mito Dreams of La Playa / Snake Bike
programme.desc: Dora helps her friend Mito the Yeti see the beach for the first time and he even wins the sandcastle competition! // On her way to the new bike park, Dora teaches Selena the Snake how to ride a bicycle.

programme.title: Side-Swiped
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear.

programme.title: Astropumpkin
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: Hat
programme.desc: Grandma gives Tim a hat she made herself, unfortunately it keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Swimming
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are at the swimming pool. Rebecca Rabbit is there too. She and Peppa are very proud of their swimming skills. Everyone is surprised to discover that Daddy Pig is very good at swimming and diving. Very good indeed.

programme.title: Foggy Day
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig are taking Peppa and George to play in the playground. On the way it gets a bit foggy, and soon it is so foggy they can't see. They decide to go home. But which way is home?

programme.title: George's Birthday
programme.desc: Today is George's birthday and Mummy and Daddy Pig have a special day planned. George gets a new Brontosaurus toy and the family go to the museum to see lots of different dinosaurs.

programme.title: Tiny Creatures
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in Grandpa Pig's garden when they find a little snail. Then Grandpa also shows them his beehive.

programme.title: The Time Capsule
programme.desc: Peppa and her school friends are making a time capsule. They each put one of their favourite things inside and bury it in the school garden. The children discover that their parents made a time capsule many years ago.

programme.title: Recycling
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig tells them that bottles go into a special green box to be recycled. Old newspapers go in a red box and tins go in a blue box. Peppa and George have fun filling the boxes.

programme.title: Daddy Pig's Office
programme.desc: Peppa and George are visiting Daddy Pig's office today. Daddy Pig works with Mr Rabbit and Mrs Cat. Mr. Rabbit's job is all about numbers, Mrs Cat's job is all about drawing shapes on the computer, and Daddy Pig's job is complicated.

programme.title: Pirate Island
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig are taking Peppa, George and their friends to Pirate Island. Grandpa shows how to use his metal detector to find treasures and they all build a big sandcastle.

programme.title: Jumble Sale
programme.desc: Peppa's playgroup is holding a jumble sale to raise money for a new roof and Madame Gazelle asks everyone to bring something to sell. Peppa and her friends bring in an old toy but they soon realise that favourite toys can be hard to let go of.

programme.title: Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: Cluc Croc / One Tree Home
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it. // Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.title: The Snow, Sea, Sky, Race
programme.desc: Blaze and Crusher face off in an off-road showdown: the Snow, Sea, Sky Race! The trucks must speed through the snow, swim through the sea, and soar to a finish line in the sky! Will Blaze win the trophy? Or will Crusher be the all-terrain champion?

programme.title: Blaze's First Race
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends remember their first ever race together, back when they were little monster machines with BIG dreams of becoming racers!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Big Bike Shop / The Crew Builds A Super Tub
programme.desc: Rubble and the pups work to build a big bike shop in time for the Bike Festival... unless Speed Meister beats them to it! // When Motor won't take a bath before their family photo, it's up to Rubble and the pups to find a construction solution.

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Ice Cream Shop / The Crew Fixes A Squeak
programme.desc: When a windy day derails construction on an ice cream shop, Rubble, Mix, Wheeler, and Charger are on the chase. // There's a mysterious squeak in City Hall. Mayor Greatway asks Rubble and Charger to find and fix the squeak before her big speech!

programme.title: Pups Save a Frozen Camp-out / Pups Save the Fizzy Pickles
programme.desc: Alex and Mr. Porter are on a tropical Island camping trip when a freak snowstorm hits! // Mr. Porter is delivering his famous fizzy pickles to people around town when a bumpy road shakes up the deliveries and causes the pickle jars to POP.

programme.title: Pups Save a Pluck-O-Matic / Pups Save a Mascot
programme.desc: Yumi's new Robo- Corn Plucker goes haywire, and Ryder and the Paw Patrol must get it under control. // Daring Danny X, dressed as a "Bird X" mascot for the Adventure Bay, gets carried away by a couple of eagles who mistake him for one of their own!

programme.title: Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.title: Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure

programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.desc: Madame Gazelle is getting Peppa and her playgroup friends to dance to all different styles of music.

programme.title: London
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes the whole class to London for the day and get a tour by The Queen herself!

programme.title: Simple Science
programme.desc: While the playground is getting rebuilt, Daddy Pig teaches the children some Simple Science!

programme.title: Easter Bunny

programme.title: School Project
programme.desc: It's school project time for Peppa and her friends which means they have to build castles and bring them into playgroup!

programme.title: The Police
programme.desc: Police Officer Panda and Police Officer Squirrel have come to teach Peppa and her friends all about bicycle safety.

programme.title: Mummy Pig's Book
programme.desc: Mummy Pig has finally finished writing her first book and decides to take it to playgroup to read to the children with unexpected results.

programme.title: The Pickle Family Campout

programme.desc: A winter ice storm causes trouble all over Adventure Bay. The PAW Patrol races to the rescue! // Mayor Goodway challenges Mayor Humdinger's Basketball team to a game. The pups pitch in and become the Adventure Bay All-Stars!

programme.title: Pups Save the Birdwatching Turbots
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot and Francois chirp for help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air.

programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove. // After a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland.

programme.desc: Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: Parents

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Pups Save a Goldrush / Pups Save the Paw Patroller
programme.desc: When a grizzled old prospector discovers gold in Adventure Bay, it's a bona fide, dog gone, gold rush! // When Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew try to steal the Paw Patroller, the chase becomes a rescue!

programme.desc: Mr. Porter's delivery drones have gone out of control, and now they are air-dropping food everywhere!

programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.desc: Rubble & Crew use their giant trucks to make awesome stunt ramps when Speed Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition // When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.desc: Dora gets a new puppy that makes her cat Lucky jealous. After he runs away, Dora tracks Lucky down to remind him of how loved he is. / Today is the championship game, but all of Dora's friends have a cold. Dora helps them feel better in time to play!

programme.title: T-Rex Trouble
programme.desc: Blaze and Zeg are in Dinosaur Valley, showing off their amazing robot powers to their dinosaur friends. But when they discover three lost little Tyrannosauruses, they must use their robot powers to get the babies home safely.

programme.title: Cluc Croc / One Tree Home
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it. // Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.desc: Today, dinosaur Blaze is teaming up with his prehistoric pal Zeg to compete in... the Dino Derby! But will this dino duo have what it takes to outrace the rest and become Dino Derby champions?

programme.desc: Witness the return of Sir Blaze and Sir AJ as they embark on an epic quest to free a magical unicorn from an unpoppable bubble!

programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: Pups Save a Freaky Pup-Day / Pups Save a Runaway Mayor
programme.desc: Chase and Chickaletta switch bodies and must learn to work together to return Cap'n Turbot's boat to the bay. // Mayor Humdinger creates robotic Pants to cheat at the Most Amazing Athlete Contest. They go haywire so Pups have to save runaway Mayor.

programme.title: Captain Dora / Bruno And The Bunny Boyz
programme.desc: Dora and Boots track down the Pirate Piggies' ship and save it from a kraken! // Dora and Boots help Bruno the Bunny find his own special dance moves in time to perform with his favorite band, the Bunny Boyz!

programme.title: Quest for the Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.title: Tickets
programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.title: Talent Show
programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: The Long Grass
programme.desc: The grass has grown so long that Peppa and George's ball gets lost. Grandpa arrives with his fantastic lawnmower and gets the grass cut in no time. Peppa and George find their plastic ball again and it bounces brilliantly on the short grass!

programme.title: Zoe Zebra, the Postman's Daughter
programme.desc: Mr. Zebra the Postman gets help from his daughter Zoe. Zoe has a very special letter for Peppa and George; an invitation to her birthday party. The party is fun, especially as it turns out that Zoe has invited all of Peppa and George's friends.

programme.title: Painting
programme.desc: Peppa and George are painting. Daddy shows them how to mix paints and the three of them paint a beautiful picture of a cherry tree. Everything is going very well, until the ducks turn up and decide to run through the paint and all over the painting.

programme.title: Cuckoo Clock
programme.desc: Daddy Pig winds up the old cuckoo clock. When a wooden cuckoo pops out singing "Cuckoo!", Peppa thinks it is very funny, but George has missed the whole thing. George does not want to miss the cuckoo again but the cuckoo only pops out once an hour.

programme.title: Sports Day
programme.desc: It is Sports Day at Peppa's playgroup. There are lots of exciting events, including running, jumping and the "tug of war". Daddy Pig tells Peppa that it's not the winning that matters.

programme.title: GrandDad Dog's Garage
programme.desc: Peppa's car runs out of petrol but thankfully Granddad Dog's garage isn't far away. With one phone call, Granddad Dog is on his way. He tows Peppa's car back to his garage.

programme.title: The Balloon Ride
programme.desc: Peppa wins the top prize in a raffle at school: a trip in a hot air balloon. Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig, George and Peppa climb aboard and enjoy the flight until the balloon gets caught in a tree. Luckily, the balloon has landed in a very familiar garden.

programme.title: George Catches a Cold
programme.desc: Peppa and George love jumping in puddles, even when it's raining - but when George takes off his rain hat, he catches a cold. After a while George is feeling much better. Now he's more than happy to wear his rain hat, even when it's not raining.

programme.title: The Eye Test
programme.desc: Pedro Pony wears glasses. Peppa thinks she might need glasses too, so Mummy Pig takes her to the optician. Peppa is a little disappointed to discover that she has perfect vision - but that doesn't stop her wearing some rather fabulous sunglasses.

programme.title: Living Together / Holey The Snowman
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: Costume Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: One Tree Home
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.desc: The twins are excited to see their first rainbow, but it's missing its colors! Dora sets off to return its azul, rojo, y amarillo. // Boots' rubber band ball bounces into the Forest Next Door, and he must ask Cynthia the Centipede to get it back.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: At just 21 years old, Alejandro Garnacho has already experienced more in his young career than many others do in a lifetime. Born in the Spanish captial, Garnacho started his career in the Atletico Madrid academy. Released as a teenager, the Argentina international moved to Manchester United, where he went on to make nearly 100 senior appearances for the club over three years before joining Chelsea in the summer.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Late last year PL Stories travelled to Dubai to spend time with Victor Moses, reflecting on a life and career shaped by resilience and determination. We delve into his difficult and deeply personal early years in Nigeria, and the tragic circumstances that led to him seeking asylum in the UK, an experience that would go on to define both his character and career.

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 星期日档案
programme.desc: 《星期日档案》，每周聚焦于热门新闻人物，特写报导；或以人性化角度，透过走访社会不同阶层，不同界别人士，深入探讨大众关切的政治、社会民生等议题。

programme.title: 流行经典50年
programme.desc: 中外乐坛历年来诞生无数金曲，不论什么年代的作品，皆各有知音人。《流行经典50年》邀请原唱人或实力歌手，再次演绎这些流行一时，兼且跨越多代的经典，为乐迷带来高质素的音乐享受。

programme.title: 财经透视
programme.desc: 《财经透视》紧贴大市，回顾每周港股走势外，并关注楼市状况，透过业界人士专访、市场分析等，深入浅出探讨本港、国际财经金融热门话题，更以专题形式报道不同行业发展面对的问题。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨 及 世界观
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 谈判专家
programme.desc: 彭国栋与简洁是「警察谈判小组」内的梦幻组合，合作从未失手。私底下，栋对洁之大女人作风却不以为然。谈判小组招募新一届谈判专家，栋与洁各持己见。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 奢游记 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 成功人士必备甚么条件与特质？熟悉外国文化的主持刘晨芝与郑衍峰结伴「奢游」，探访在美国生活的好友嘉宾，一探NBA前球员、企业家、设计师、阔太、艺术家、收藏家等鲜为人知的故事，了解他们对成功的定义，见识富裕生活空间与品味方式。

programme.title: 新闻掏宝
programme.desc: 《新闻掏宝》带大家在宝库「掏」新闻宝藏，除了昔日特辑、直播和系列报道，还有从未曝光的珍贵片段，观众有机会重温李小龙出殡、宝生银行劫案、四人帮审讯、英女王访港、的士罢驶、中英签订联合声明、戴卓尔夫人专访等。

programme.title: Holistic way+京都念慈庵:正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: 机智女法医2 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 楚楚与萧晋瑜婚后携手三法司，护送金桃期间破解宫中哭寺、金粉、马球等诡案，对抗南诏外交阴谋，守护盛世长安。

programme.title: 奢游记
programme.desc: 成功人士必备甚么条件与特质？熟悉外国文化的主持刘晨芝与郑衍峰结伴「奢游」，探访在美国生活的好友嘉宾，一探NBA前球员、企业家、设计师、阔太、艺术家、收藏家等鲜为人知的故事，了解他们对成功的定义，见识富裕生活空间与品味方式。

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: ㇐个人去旅行
programme.desc: 厌倦了打卡式旅游？网络红人梁嘉铭(Ming仔)忠于自己，零行程、即兴自驾游，以第一视觉分享旅行日常，一贯只身「Freesty游」，发掘无数次的独行美丽！

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导& 世界观 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Holistic way+京都念慈庵:正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 机智女法医2
programme.desc: 楚楚与萧晋瑜婚后携手三法司，护送金桃期间破解宫中哭寺、金粉、马球等诡案，对抗南诏外交阴谋，守护盛世长安。

programme.title: 试真D
programme.desc: 主持团队用大众点评App探访大湾区高分和低分的餐厅及景点。通过实地体验，揭秘高分是否名副其实，低分中是否有惊喜发现。

programme.title: 娱乐头条
programme.desc: 每晚紧贴香港娱乐圈的消息，以至世界各地的影视娱乐新闻，报道艺人最新动态、剧集和电影宣传、演唱会精华、颁奖礼盛况等，让大家瞬间掌握影视娱乐圈的动态和最新消息。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.title: 世界观
programme.desc: 由资深新闻工作者负责的《世界观》，带你用世界观、观世界，更阔更广看新闻、长知识。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 卫斯理蓝血人
programme.desc: 联合国外星生物分析局成员卫斯理在调查神秘蓝色人骨时，重遇拥有蓝色血液的外星女子方天涯，并卷入外星势力的追捕与冲突之中。在生死交锋与逃亡过程中，两人逐渐建立深厚情感，同时揭开一场关乎外星秘密与命运的惊人真相。

programme.title: 长风渡
programme.desc: 自小受尽磨砺的徉州城布商之女柳玉茹与当地著名纨绔顾九思阴差阳错结为夫妻, 性格迥异的两人在错位婚姻里, 从相互抵触到相互扶持, 相互治愈。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 中餐厅7
programme.desc: 本季《中餐厅》将由几位嘉宾组成双档营业小分队，再度出海营业，在匈牙利开设中餐厅，以美好、美味打造丝路飘香 ，展开一场的中华美食出海之旅。

programme.title: 把关者们

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 承欢记
programme.desc: 出身于上海普通人家的95后麦承欢，在母亲的催促下与男友辛家亮议婚。但辛家优渥的经济条件让这段原本平等的感情关系变得失衡。看看麦承欢是如何走出了一条独属于自己的成长之路！

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！
